refs.description: FreeBSD's generic intrusive tree header provides the splay-tree macro family used throughout the kernel.
OpenBSD kernel's tree.h defines the original SPLAY_* macros used by kernel subsystems for self-organizing containers.
A fast standalone JavaScript splay-tree implementation packaged as a reusable library.
A clean C++ reference implementation of a splay tree with zig/zig-zig/zig-zag splaying.
